title: Designing a Conversational AI with Nested Dialogue Trees
scenario: Design a conversational AI that can handle nested dialogue trees for a customer service chatbot. The chatbot must be able to respond to user input, escalate issues to a human agent, and provide relevant information on product features. The output should be a UML state machine diagram (as markdown) showing the conversation flow. Constraints: Must use standard UML notations, must include at least 5 states, and must be under 200 lines of code. The evaluation criteria are: (1) adherence to UML standards (30 points), (2) correct handling of nested dialogue trees (25 points), (3) clarity of conversation flow (20 points), (4) accuracy of product information (15 points), and (5) code readability (10 points).
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the UML state machine diagram adheres to standard UML notations and formatting.
Evaluates if the chatbot correctly handles nested dialogue trees and escalates issues to human agents.
Assesses the clarity and coherence of the conversation flow in the UML state machine diagram.
Checks if the chatbot provides accurate and up-to-date information on product features.
Evaluates the readability and maintainability of the code in the UML state machine diagram.
